titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Walid Ibn Subayh
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Walid Ibn Subayh

segments: ه عن الوليد بن صبيح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن المختار، عن الوليد ابن صبيح‌.
arabic.text: ه عن الوليد بن صبيح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن المختار، عن الوليد ابن صبيح‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Walid ibn Subayh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Al-Mukhtar, from Al-Walid ibn Subayh.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Walid ibn Subayh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Al-Mukhtar, from Al-Walid ibn Subayh.
